raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX not able to provide us with a clean room when we went to inspect the room with a hotel desk employee we immediately declined the room in question however we were billed for the same XXXX night for {$180.00}. I did not authorize the hotel to charge me as they submitted this charge to Citi XXXX the next day, XX/XX/2023 because we did not stay overnight. This charge was made without my approval nor was I present to sign for the card. 

In addition the hotel refused to show us the room until I submitted my credit card which they obtained by fraud and my signature for a so called parking space. 

Citi XXXX did not believe me and I offered to submit my XXXX witness statements to verify how and why this charge was made by XXXX XXXX by fraud however Citi refused to allow me to include my XXXX witness statements. 

In conclusion, my Citi XXXX XXXX number was stolen and then used the next day without my approval nor knowledge because of fraud committed by XXXX XXXX. This is credit card fraud NOT a billing dispute. Its the same as if the card had been stolen. 

There has been no response from Citi XXXX explaining why this is a valid charge.
